title: Duplicate Workspace App Not Working
excerpt: I’m trying to create an app that will duplicate a workspace, rather than having to recreate manually the workspace for each client.  However, when I create the app, install it, and try to add it to a workspace I get the …

posts.author: Hera (ELG)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to create an app that will duplicate a workspace, rather than having to recreate manually the workspace for each client. However, when I create the app, install it, and try to add it to a workspace I get the this error message.

Screenshot 2023-02-09 at 10.27.52 AM1792×254 22 KB

Any ideas on what is going on?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Hera,

Could you please share how the workspaces are being duplicated?

Currently, our API does not support the duplication of workspaces

posts.author: Hera (ELG)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there. I figured it out. It was a permission issue. I built an app to duplicate a workspace. The trick is…
You have to make sure that the items your duplicating from a workspace are set to Main instead of Sharable. The the app you create to duplicate the workspace works like a charm.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Hera,

I’m happy to hear it!

Let me know if you have any more questions

posts.author: User129438 (John S)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @Hera, I’m also looking to do something involving having a master workspace and then I want to duplicate it for various clients. Did you end up just duplicating a “template” type workspace and then it’s totally separate? Like once you duplicate it, if you had 50 clients, and decided you wanted to add a column, would you have to manually add it to all 50 workspaces or did you figure out a way to change it on the master workspace and have it push to all 50?
